case_title: HOCH, EDWIN vs. LIMITONE, JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOCH, EDWIN COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-01-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/BRENDA CRUZ KEITH AS COUNSEL. DEF. JOHN LIMITONE NOT PRESENT, BUT HAS VACATED THE PREMISES. DEF. FREDERICK HAYES PRESENT & IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - REST- ITUTION OF PREMISES AT 337 OAK ST, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 11-16-93, 5PM - LEASE/ RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED - PL. WAIVES ALL BACK RENT & DAM- AGES - EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS & ATTY FEES. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $27.50 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOCH, EDWIN
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOCH, EDWIN AS TO DEFENDANT LIMITONE, JOHN HAYES, FRED DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAYES, FRED THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 337 OAK ST, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL NOV-16-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, DEF. JOHN LIMITONE HAS ABANDONED THE PREMISES.
